execution_run.what happened: Added a generated operation-executor handler kind for target-root resolution and switched memory path.target_root.resolve to the target-local generated resource primitive.
execution_run.scope touched: command package IR/schema, command-generation renderer, generated memory projections, generated proof, and plan state
execution_run.changed surfaces: generated/memory/python/primitives/operation_executor.py no longer imports _resolve_memory_target_root; generated metadata records generated_target_root_resolve
execution_run.validations run: generation check; generated package static proof; Python conformance; Docker Python conformance; planning doctor; targeted pytest suite
execution_run.result for continuation: one repo_memory_bootstrap.runtime_primitives import is retired from generated memory operation execution
execution_run.next step: commit/push this slice, then continue #892 with the next memory runtime delegate blocker.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded target-root delegate is complete, but #892 remains open because other generated memory/planning/workspace delegates still import package runtime modules.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Generated memory executor uses resolve_repo_target_root from generated primitives; static/conformance/Docker proof passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Generated memory operation executor again imports _resolve_memory_target_root or does not render resolve_repo_target_root for path.target_root.resolve.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
